frictions.description: On login/signup and all protected-route attempts, the Next.js error overlay became the only interactive surface (Hide Errors button), preventing normal flow interactions.
frictions.resolution: No safe local fix inside validator scope; documented blocker and continued route-by-route evidence capture.

frictions.description: Repeated stack-frame error fetches created noisy network logs and obscured functional API traffic.
frictions.resolution: Filtered observations to blocker-specific signals and captured route screenshots per assertion.

blockers.description: Frontend runtime missing required env vars: NEXT_PUBLIC_INSFORGE_URL and NEXT_PUBLIC_INSFORGE_ANON_KEY. This crashes login/signup and prevents authenticated app shell from rendering.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried loads across /login?mode=signup and protected routes, reloaded session, and verified repo root lacks .env.local. Block persisted.

summary: Tested 25 assigned assertions with one isolated agent-browser session: 0 pass, 0 fail, 25 blocked due missing NEXT_PUBLIC_INSFORGE_* runtime configuration in the running dev server.
